message:
fix(clippy): Address clippy warnings and improve code quality

- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to planned `leading` field in Table
- Fix uninlined format args in progress.rs and rule.rs
- Fix highlight_regex/highlight_words API to take &Style references
- Update tests to use &Style references
- Apply map_or idiom fixes across codebase
- Collapse nested if-let chains
- Various other clippy lint fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
